data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Ensures the website adapts to a variety of devices and screen sizes, providing an optimal viewing experience.
data.technical_spec: Uses flexible grids, layouts, and CSS media queries.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Content Delivery Network is used to enhance load time and performance by distributing content geographically closer to users.
data.technical_spec: Leveraged with services like Akamai or Cloudflare.

data.title: Single Page Application
data.description: Features parts of the site as SPAs to dynamically update pages without full reloads, enhancing user experience.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using JavaScript frameworks like React or Angular.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Divides services into smaller, self-contained units, which can be developed and scaled independently.
data.technical_spec: Uses RESTful APIs or GraphQL for service communication.

data.title: Headless CMS
data.description: Decouples the backend content repository from front-end presentation layer, enhancing flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Systems like Contentful or Strapi are used.
